assessment.note: Carl finds the team collaboration fine but is frustrated by the excessive number of standups, indicating a mild negative impact on wellbeing and engagement.

new_queue.label: Motivation drivers
new_queue.name: What aspects of your work are most motivating to you currently?
new_queue.description: Identifies what currently drives their engagement and motivation.

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What kind of projects or skills would push you to grow right now?
new_queue.description: Uncovers areas for skill development and growth opportunities.

new_queue.label: Manager support needs
new_queue.name: What specific support do you need from me right now to succeed?
new_queue.description: Identifies areas where the manager can provide better support.

new_queue.label: Standup feedback
new_queue.name: What would make the standups more effective for you?
new_queue.description: Seeks specific feedback on how to improve the standup meetings.
